nodes.label: Mid-May Event Window
nodes.source_file: references/sources/articles/2026-05-11 223954_冰冰小美_明天12就是韩国经贸谈判，后天13川访华。目前市场热度起来，完全交易乐观。15结束访问，不出意外，15米联储新主席上台。.md

nodes.rationale: Trade talks, a visit, a central-bank leadership change, and index-futures settlement are treated as simultaneous conditions for cautious positioning.
